news.headline: Robert Craig Films announces nationwide distribution of film "No Address" starting Feb. 28, 2025, on World Homeless Day.
news.summary: Robert Craig Films has successfully secured nationwide distribution for their feature film "No Address" with Fathom. The film will debut in theaters across the country starting on Friday, February 28th, 2025. The announcement was made on October 10, 2024, in Sacramento, California. The move coincides with World Homeless Day, highlighting the social impact of this dramatic film.

news.headline: Evoke Advisors ranked #1 on Forbes' "America's Top RIA Firms" with $25.3 billion in assets under management.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on October 8, 2024, Evoke Advisors, a firm specializing in wealth advisory and investment management, secured the top spot on Forbes' "America's Top RIA Firms" list for the third consecutive year. With around $25.3 billion in assets under management, Evoke Advisors continues to demonstrate its leadership in the industry.

news.headline: CPI inflation rises, jobless claims surge, Fed not worried, S&P 500 slips. Nov. 7 rate cut likely.
news.summary: Amid a spike in jobless claims, the Federal Reserve is expected to proceed with a rate cut on Nov. 7 despite the Consumer Price Index data showing high inflation. The S&P 500 experienced a slight decline from its previous record high. This suggests that the Fed remains focused on supporting the economy despite the inflation surge.

news.headline: Northvolt's battery production in Northern Sweden has slowed down unexpectedly.
Kremlin: Putin and Iran's President to discuss Mideast situation - IFX.
Flywheel.io appoints Matthew A. Michela as CEO, replacing Hooman Hakami; leading medical imaging platform.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Flywheel.io, a prominent platform for managing and analyzing medical imaging data, revealed a change in leadership. Matthew A. Michela has taken over as the new CEO, replacing Hooman Hakami, who served as the interim CEO. This transition marks a significant shift for the company as it continues to establish its position in the industry. Flywheel.io is known for its comprehensive approach to medical imaging data management and analysis, catering to a wide range of healthcare professionals and institutions.

news.headline: Chiropractic franchise 100% debuts at No. 372 on Franchise Times Top 400 list, shows rapid growth.  #chiropractic #franchise #growth
news.summary: 100% Chiropractic, a top chiropractic care provider, has made a significant achievement by securing the No. 372 spot on the esteemed Franchise Times Top 400 list. The company, based in Scottsdale, Arizona, has experienced rapid growth, leading to this milestone. This ranking is a testament to the company's success and position in the industry.

news.headline: Mimir offers AI-driven solutions to outdated language education, addressing challenges for both students and teachers. Los Angeles, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Los Angeles, there are concerns raised about the efficacy of second language learning due to outdated methods. The current traditional approach relies on costly static textbooks and obsolete materials, creating hurdles for both students and teachers. This approach fails to adapt to modern needs, hindering effective language education.

news.headline: Research report on Augmented Connected Worker (ACW) sector for 2023-2030 added on ResearchAndMarkets.com. Analysis includes segmentation by region, industry type (process, hybrid, discrete), and 18 end-user industries. Manufacturing tasks are complex, frontline workers interact with multiple systems daily.
news.summary: A report titled "Growth Opportunities in the Augmented Connected Worker Sector, Global, 2023-2030" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report delves into the segmentation of the Augmented Connected Worker (ACW) market based on region and industry type, which includes process, hybrid, and discrete manufacturing. Additionally, the study covers 18 various end-user industries. It highlights the growing complexity of manufacturing tasks where frontline workers are required to engage with numerous vertical systems regularly. This analysis provides valuable insights for businesses looking to capitalize on the ACW sector's expansion.

news.headline: RecNation expands in Orlando with 6th location in Fruitland Park, marking continued growth in RV storage market.
news.summary: RecNation Storage, a prominent company in the specialized recreational vehicle (RV) and boat storage industry in the US, recently finalized the acquisition of a new property in Fruitland Park, Florida. This development signifies the Company's expansion, with this being its sixth location in the Orlando market. By adding this property to its portfolio, RecNation now operates a total of six facilities in Orlando, showcasing its strong dedication to catering to the demands of recreational enthusiasts. This move aligns with RecNation's strategy to continuously grow and enhance its services for customers across the region.

news.headline: DCIM Market valued at $8.97 billion in 2023, projected to grow at 13.7% CAGR by 2030 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on the Global Data Center Infrastructure Management Market forecasts significant growth in the sector. Valued at USD 8.97 billion in 2023, the market is projected to expand at a CAGR of 13.7% from 2025 to 2030. The report covers market size, trends, opportunities, and forecasts based on components, data center types, offerings, regions, and countries. The Data Center Infrastructure Management market has shown promising growth trends.

news.headline: Saviynt named leader in Workforce Identity & Access Management by Frost & Sullivan in 2024 report.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Saviynt, a prominent provider of cloud-native identity and governance platform solutions, was recently recognized as a leader in the Frost & Sullivan report, specifically the 2024 Frost Radar: Workforce Identity & Access Management. The report assessed top IAM vendors in terms of their ability to safeguard organizations and their external workforces from identity-related attacks. This acknowledgment solidifies Saviynt's position in the industry and demonstrates its dedication to enhancing security measures. This recognition highlights the effectiveness of Saviynt's solutions and underscores the company's commitment to innovation and excellence in the field of identity and access management.

news.headline: Hurricane Milton caused 850,000 outages for Duke Energy Florida as a Category 3 storm hits.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on October 10, 2024, Duke Energy Florida announced a significant number of power outages totaling around 850,000 as of 8 a.m. Thursday, following the impact of Hurricane Milton as a Category 3 storm in the state. The company anticipates this number to fluctuate as affected individuals are able to safely go back home.

news.headline: Form 8.3 filed for Balanced Commercial Property Trust Limited.
CPI inflation rises, jobless claims spike, S&P 500 slips, Fed not swayed, possible rate cut on Nov. 7.
news.summary: Despite the recent surge in jobless claims, the Federal Reserve is expected to proceed with a rate cut on Nov. 7, even in light of high consumer price index data. The S&P 500 experienced a decline from its peak. This increase in jobless claims presents a substantial challenge for the Federal Reserve, especially with the latest CPI data showing high inflation levels. The market reaction is evident in the S&P 500's dip from its record high.

news.headline: DoubleVerify (DV) will introduce pre-screen controls on Meta's platforms, enhancing brand safety. Advertisers can now avoid unsuitable content before serving ads on Facebook & Instagram.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, DoubleVerify (NYSE: DV), a prominent digital media measurement and analytics software platform, revealed plans to introduce content-level pre-screen avoidance for Meta's platforms Facebook and Instagram Feed and Reels. This new tool will be added to their existing suite of independent brand safety and suitability tools. The update aims to provide advertisers with the ability to prevent their ads from appearing alongside undesirable content, safeguarding their brand reputation on Meta's platforms.

news.headline: Turkey plans to adjust inflation accounting rule to protect investments as inflation rate hit a high of 19.25%.
AFS Logistics recognized as Newsweek's top 200 Most Loved Workplaces for 2024. List by Most Loved Workplace®.
news.summary: In Shreveport, Louisiana on October 10, 2024, AFS Logistics, a top 3PL provider, proudly reveals its inclusion in Newsweek's prestigious list of America's top 200 Most Loved Workplaces®. This annual distinction, curated by Most Loved Workplace® under Best Practice Institute (BPI), celebrates exceptional workplaces nationwide.

news.headline: Datasea Inc. pre-announces FY 2025 Q1 revenue at $22.7 million, showing a 230% YoY increase.
news.summary: Today, Datasea Inc. (Nasdaq: DTSS), a digital technology company based in Nevada, revealed preliminary information regarding its financial performance. The company, specializing in advancements in acoustics high-tech and 5G AI multimodal digital technologies, announced a sneak peek of its revenue numbers for the first quarter of an undisclosed fiscal year.

news.headline: HODL FM offers latest crypto news, simplifying complex terms, becoming go-to site; a guide in blockchain and AI.
news.summary: HODL FM is a comprehensive platform aiming to be the go-to source for all things cryptocurrency-related. With the crypto industry booming and changing lives, HODL FM simplifies complex terms, offers news, updates, and serves as a guide for those interested in decentralized finance. This platform covers blockchain, cryptocurrency, daily currency prices, metaverse, AI industry updates, and more. To stay informed about the crypto universe, HODL FM on hodlfm.com is the place to be. Visit Benzinga.com for the full story.

news.headline: OneOncology completes acquisition of United Urology Group, with support from TPG and Cencora, aiming to expand urology care.
news.summary: Collaboration between OneOncology, backed by investors TPG and Cencora, aims to boost growth by enhancing comprehensive, high-value urology services in physician-owned practices and ambulatory surgery centers. By partnering with UUG, they seek to leverage a common culture of physician-driven leadership and dedication. This venture is poised to significantly expand services and reach a larger number of patients in need of specialized urological care.

news.headline: Claims now open for Fluor Corp stock losses, if bought between May 6, 2016 and Feb 17, 2020 - eligible for $14.6M payout.
news.summary: Investors who bought Fluor Corporation common stock (FLR) from May 6, 2016 to February 17, 2020, and retained it during key corrective disclosures, may qualify for compensation from a $14.6 million Fair Fund based in Seattle, as of October 10, 2024.

news.headline: Kauhale Health acquires ALMC in Ohio's Miami Valley region to lead market in memory care. Third acquisition in 2 years.
news.summary: Leading the market in memory care living accommodations, Kauhale Health, based in Westerville, Ohio, has recently acquired Symphony Centerville, a purpose-built memory care community located in Centerville, OH. This acquisition is the third in two years for Kauhale, solidifying its position in the industry. This move positions Kauhale as a key player in providing specialized memory care services, catering to the increasing demand for such accommodations.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls due to high inflation data, Tesla's pre-Robotaxi event boosts stock.
news.summary: The Dow Jones experienced a decline today due to a significant inflation report. Meanwhile, Tesla saw a surge in its stock ahead of the anticipated Robotaxi event. This drop in the Dow Jones was notable as it fell due to the latest inflation figures. On the other hand, Tesla's stock rallied, indicating positive investor sentiment before the upcoming Robotaxi event.

news.headline: Mexico Ecommerce Market expected to reach $61.4 billion by 2024, set to grow to over $82 billion by 2028 with 8.78% annual growth rate. Key players across various verticals included in the report.
news.summary: A report on Mexico's Ecommerce Market Opportunities Databook 2024 has been released, featuring 100+ KPIs across various verticals such as Shopping, Travel, Food Service, Media & Entertainment, and Technology. Key highlights include market share analysis by major players, sales channel breakdown, payment instrument trends, and consumer demographics. The E-commerce sector in Mexico is projected to experience an annual growth rate of 8.78%, culminating in a market value of US$61.4 billion by 2024. This suggests a promising medium to long-term growth trajectory for E-commerce in the country.

news.headline: Knightscope Reseller TS&L orders 37 new security robots from Knightscope in Mountain View, California.
news.summary: Mountain View, California-based Knightscope has received a significant boost as TS&L, a reseller, recently placed purchase orders for 37 new security robots. These high-tech devices, designed for enhanced security measures, indicate a growing demand for advanced surveillance solutions. This move reflects a positive trend in the industry, signaling an increasing adoption of innovative technology to improve security protocols. This development solidifies Knightscope's position as a leading provider of security robots and illustrates the company's growth potential in this sector.

news.headline: Atera and GoTo partner to enhance IT management with Mobile Device Management from Miradore.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in New York, technology companies Atera and GoTo revealed a partnership. Atera offers a comprehensive IT management platform merging RMM, Helpdesk, and ticketing with AI to enhance efficiency on a large scale. GoTo specializes in simplifying IT management, support, and business communications. This collaboration aims to leverage their respective strengths to improve organizational operations.

news.headline: WorkBuzz acquires Agenda Consulting to expand in US not-for-profit sector. Leading specialist for deskless workers. NYC, Oct 10, 2024.
news.summary: WorkBuzz, a top employee engagement specialist for organizations with deskless and frontline staff, has revealed its acquisition that will facilitate its expansion in the U.S. not-for-profit industry. This news was made public on October 10, 2024, in New York. This move will allow WorkBuzz to broaden its scope and offer its services to more companies in this sector.

news.headline: CPSC advises halting use of Jisell's Garberiel lithium-ion battery chargers from Amazon, citing a serious fire hazard.
news.summary: On October 10th, 2024, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) issued a warning advising consumers to discontinue the use of Garberiel lithium-ion battery chargers produced by Jisell Inc. from China. These chargers, available for purchase on Amazon.com and various other online platforms, have been identified as posing a safety hazard.

news.headline: Martha's Vineyard nurses authorize 1-day strike as they seek fair contract with MGB, citing staffing and patient care challenges.
news.summary: In Oak Bluffs, Massachusetts, around 100 nurses from Martha's Vineyard are gearing up for a potential one-day strike. This comes in response to MGB's failure to recognize the critical patient care services that nurses deliver in challenging conditions within the isolated and costly setting of the island.

news.headline: Sacks Parente Golf Inc. closed an underwritten public offering of 366,000 shares, raising $732k. Tech golf company growing its product portfolio.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, based in Camarillo, CA, Sacks Parente Golf, Inc. (Nasdaq: SPGC), also known as SPG, a cutting-edge golf company, completed an underwritten public offering of 366,000 shares of Common Stock. The Offering generated around $732,000 in gross proceeds before accounting for underwriting discounts and additional offering costs. SPG specializes in various golf products, including putters, golf shafts, grips, and other accessories, aiming to broaden its product line and technological innovations.

news.headline: upGrad KnowledgeHut achieves Platinum SPCT Tier from Scaled Agile Inc., ranking among top 15 global organizations.
news.summary: In a recent achievement, upGrad KnowledgeHut, a division of global skilling and workforce development leader upGrad, has been recognized as a Platinum SPCT Tier Business Partner by Scaled Agile Inc. This places the brand among the top 15 organizations worldwide. The accreditation was received on October 10, 2024, in New York, marking a significant milestone.

news.headline: Fintech startup Sidepit secures pre-seed funding for patented DLOB tech; aims to democratize trading.
news.summary: A startup based in Berkeley, California, named Sidepit, Inc. has recently completed a pre-seed financing round successfully. This development will allow Sidepit to expedite the progress of a revolutionary trading platform centered on their patented Decentralized Limit Order Book (DLOB). The aim of this innovative technology is to democratize trading by eradicating hidden market manipulation prevalent in both centralized and decentralized exchanges. Sidepit conducted a roadshow across San Francisco as part of their strategic operations.

news.headline: AARP CEO responds to announcement of 2.5% Social Security COLA for 2025, adding $561 yearly for average recipient.
news.summary: In Washington on October 10, 2024, the CEO of AARP, Jo Ann Jenkins, addressed the recent announcement of a 2.5% cost-of-living adjustment (COLA). This adjustment translates to an extra $561 annually in Social Security income for the average recipient.

news.headline: Minnesota and Michigan nonprofits partner with Internet2 for digital inclusion through eduroam, providing global Wi-Fi access to schools and libraries.
news.summary: The Learning Network of Minnesota and Merit Network have recently teamed up with the eduroam Support Organizations Program to provide global Wi-Fi access to schools, libraries, and other facilities. This initiative is set to impact K-12 students, teachers, and staff members in Minnesota and Michigan, offering them enhanced connectivity and learning opportunities. The collaboration was formalized on October 10, 2024 in Washington, aiming to bring better internet access to a significant number of educational institutions in the region.

news.headline: ArcBest's U-Pack partners with Affirm to provide flexible financing for long-distance moving costs, giving customers innovative payment plans.
news.summary: U-Pack, a company based in Fort Smith, Arkansas, has announced a partnership with Affirm. This collaboration aims to provide customers with innovative payment plans to better manage the costs associated with long-distance moving. Affirm's services will enable customers to spread out their payments over time, making the process of moving more financially manageable. This partnership is set to benefit customers facing moving expenses, offering them greater flexibility and control. The specifics of the payment plans and the potential impact on customer experience are yet to be disclosed.

news.headline: WH Economic Advisor Brainard: We keep making progress.
Internationally acclaimed Wonder Haus in Pagosa Springs, Colorado, with a four-story tower, set on 7 acres, is for sale.
news.summary: Located in Pagosa Springs, Colorado, the Wonder Haus, an Airbnb Earth Home, is now on sale through Galles Properties. This property, renowned worldwide, boasts a stunning four-story observation tower and sits on a spacious 7-acre land.

news.headline: Positive preclinical data on Reqorsa® gene therapy presented at 2024 EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium. Reqorsa shows tumor suppressing activity in lung cancer, mesothelioma, and glioblastoma.
news.summary: A new gene therapy called Reqorsa has shown effectiveness in overcoming acquired resistance to Lumakras in lung cancer patients. In a recent study, Reqorsa demonstrated strong tumor suppressive activity in cases of mesothelioma. It has also been found to induce apoptosis in glioblastoma cells. The results were presented in Austin, Texas on October 10, 2024 by Genprex, Inc. (NASDAQ: XXXX). This breakthrough therapy offers hope for patients with these difficult-to-treat cancers.

news.headline: IAS launches first-to-market meta optimization solution for advertisers on Facebook and Instagram. - Oct 10, 2024. $IAS Nasdaq.
news.summary: Advertisers worldwide can now take advantage of AI-powered content block lists and improved brand suitability while promoting on Facebook and Instagram Feed and Reels. The solutions are offered by Integral Ad Science (Nasdaq: IAS), a prominent player in global media measurement and optimization. This development was announced on October 10, 2024, in New York. These advancements aim to enhance the advertising experience, providing more targeted and effective campaigns on these popular social media platforms.

news.headline: SuiteSpot secures Series-A funding from RET Ventures and UDR for multifamily software. Founded in 2017, it aims to streamline maintenance.
news.summary: SuiteSpot, a software company specializing in multifamily centralization, has officially completed its Series A funding round in Toronto. The investment, led by prominent real estate technology venture capital firm RET Ventures, also saw contributions from UDR, a major multifamily Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT). SuiteSpot, founded by Elik Jaeger in 2017, focuses on enhancing and simplifying multifamily maintenance management. The company's platform aims to assist property owners and operators in consolidating their maintenance operations efficiently.

news.headline: Reworld™ SECONN wins United Way Community Partner of the Year award for sustainable waste solutions in Preston, CT.
news.summary: Preston, Connecticut - On October 10, 2024, Reworld™, a prominent provider of sustainable waste management services and manager of the Reworld™ SECONN Thermomechanical Treatment Facility (TTF), has received the esteemed Community Partner of the Year accolade from the United Environmental Alliance. This recognition signifies Reworld™'s exceptional contributions to environmental stewardship and community engagement.

news.headline: Emplifi's report shows influencers play major role in brand success; influencer content drives 49.5% of social shoppers to buy.
news.summary: In New York, Emplifi, a top customer engagement platform, unveiled its "2024 State of Influencer Marketing Report," highlighting crucial trends for brands to enhance their influencer partnerships. A recent report by EMARKETER emphasized the significant impact of influencers on a brand's ecommerce performance, with influencer and creator content prompting approximately 49.5% of social shoppers to buy products. Emplifi's data confirms a clear connection between influencer marketing and driving consumer purchases.

news.headline: CHEFMAN® wins Red Dot Award for Best Design Concept for air fryer "The Dominator" and blender "The Obliterator". Exceptional products recognized.
news.summary: NEW YORK, Oct. 10, 2024 – Chefman's latest products, the Dominator™ air fryer and the Obliterator™ blender, have been honored with the Best Design Concept award by a prestigious global design competition. These cutting-edge kitchen appliances received recognition for their exceptional design.

news.headline: Document Crunch raises $21.5M Series B funding to ensure construction compliance with help from Titanium Ventures, Nemetschek Group, and major construction companies, including Andres Construction and Satterfield & Pontikes.
news.summary: A platform in the construction industry known as Document Crunch recently disclosed that they have secured $21.5 million in Series B funding. This funding round was spearheaded by Titanium Ventures and saw involvement from key strategic partner Nemetschek Group, as well as notable construction companies like Andres Construction and Satterfield & Pontikes. Existing investors such as Navitas Capital, Zacua Ventures, Fifth Wall, and Ironspring Ventures also joined in on this funding round. This injection of capital will help the platform in advancing its services.

news.headline: University of South Carolina releases inaugural AI Index results, providing insights on AI in journalism, elections, and work. (Word Count: 15)
news.summary: Findings from the University of South Carolina College of Information and Communications (CIC) show significant insights regarding the use of artificial intelligence (AI) in journalism, elections, and the future of work. Released on October 10, 2024, the inaugural AI Index survey provides valuable data on these topics. The survey is the first of its kind and presents a comprehensive overview of the current landscape. Stay informed about the latest trends in AI with this important research.

news.headline: Hyperlink InfoSystem named a top Web Development Company in New York City among the competitive tech market in 2024.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, New York City and Los Angeles witnessed a surge in the tech market, with a focus on NYC as a prominent hub for innovation. This dynamic digital sector in NYC has consistently showcased fierce competition and creativity. The United States, especially NYC, has become a prominent player in the tech industry, with key emphasis on NYC's reputation for pioneering technological advancements.

news.headline: Singapore's Ecommerce market expected to hit $18.1 billion by 2024 with annual growth rate of 10.43%, set to reach $25 billion by 2028. Key players in retail, travel, and food services highlighted.
news.summary: A report on the Singapore Ecommerce Market Opportunities has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report covers 100+ key performance indicators on various Ecommerce verticals such as Shopping, Travel, Food Service, Media & Entertainment, and Technology. It includes insights on market share by key players, sales channel analysis, payment instrument trends, and consumer demographics. The E-commerce market in Singapore is projected to experience a 10.43% annual growth rate, reaching a value of US$18.1 billion by 2024. This signifies a promising medium to long-term growth trajectory for the E-commerce sector in the country.

news.headline: Sunday Swagger introduces new product lines including shorts, button-ups, Weekday Polos, and outerwear. Made from premium polyester span material for comfort.
news.summary: A company based in Yorba Linda, California called Sunday Swagger, known for their performance golf apparel prioritizing comfort and style, has launched a new line of men’s clothing. The collection includes shorts and casual short-sleeve button-up shirts, as well as a fresh range of Weekday Polos and outerwear perfect for the upcoming fall fashion season. Sunday Swagger is famous for its vibrant designs and is now expanding into shorts, providing options made from high-quality polyester span that are sleek, wrinkle-resistant, and non-shrink. This new release presents a variety of stylish choices for customers seeking both comfort and personality in their clothing options.

news.headline: US Army selects IS&S's ThrustSense® Autothrottle for C-12 fleet, enhancing safety and efficiency. Contract runs until Sept 2024.
news.summary: In Exton, Pennsylvania, Innovative Solutions & Support, Inc. has announced that the US Army has chosen their patented ThrustSense® Autothrottle system for installation on C-12 (B200) aircraft with ProLine 21 avionics suites. This system offers comprehensive flight envelope protection throughout all stages of flight, along with go-around capabilities, allowing pilots to manage engine power settings automatically for improved safety and performance. The contract secured for this project is slated to run until September 2024.
